notes: Canonical contracts are offline reference only and must not be imported by runtime code.
default.value = the default value kept in settings when untouched.
default.send = whether the field is sent by default when user settings are untouched and no route-specific exclusion applies.
send_rules captures route/mode exceptions such as refs-present, fixed-seed, or model-specific restrictions.
showPayload is local-only and never sent to provider payloads.
